name: fan-identity-cricket
description: Fan Identity – Cricket Edition: The ultimate cricket fan engagement app

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && xcopy /E /I /Y dist ..\backend\public
scripts.build:unix: cd frontend && npm run build && cp -r dist/* ../backend/public/
scripts.dev: echo 'Run backend and frontend separately for dev mode'
